title: EPIC: Intraday/microstructure (L2 order-book) strategy for the live week — CEO-committed Jun 15-21 build
source: CEO decision 2026-06-11 (pm-day): committed to full Jun 15-21 microstructure build over freeze/polish and bounded-spike alternatives.
why: Live window ~5 days, frozen at launch. A bar-based D1/H4 book sees ~5-30 bars => variance-dominated on both the Jun-24 risk-adjusted cut and final Sharpe. Bar-based DIRECTIONAL edge is EXHAUSTED (148 Loop A ticks, 9/9 M3 audits falsified, honest null AUC~0.5). Intraday/L2 is the ONE regime where trade COUNT can stabilize the Sharpe denominator within 5 days. New Jun 15: ~1mo tick data w/ >=5-level book depth (CSV) + live L2 stream. CEO committed.
value_rationale: Only lever attacking variance-domination structurally (many independent intraday bets vs ~5-30 bars). Targets Best Sharpe ($10k)+equity rank; L2-native build strengthens Best-Tech.
scope: PRE-DATA (Jun 11-14): (a) quant-phd-advisor survey of REAL/measurable microstructure edges on FX+crypto at tick/L2 over a 5-day window (OFI, microprice, queue/CLOB dynamics, short-horizon reversal, VPIN), cite LdP corpus+current lit. (b) tick/L2 CSV ingestion contract (mirror pipeline/data.py: schema, monotonic ts, tz-aware, book-depth cols). (c) intraday backtest harness w/ realistic fills+impact + parity-test plan. (d) risk envelope inside existing survival-book/kill-switch framework.

POST-DATA (Jun 15+): ingest+validate sample tick/L2 CSV; minimal feature primitives; rule-based primary first (pure-primary invariant); walk-forward/CPCV on ~1mo sample; PRE-REGISTERED falsification bar BEFORE any deploy.
GATE: microstructure card blessed only via risk-officer review + pre-registered Sharpe/PSR bar on ~1mo OOS. No live deploy of unvalidated intraday strategy (CLAUDE.md no-deploy invariant).
recommendation: Sequence: (1) quant-phd-advisor survey NOW. (2) ingestion+harness contracts pre-data so Jun 15 is plug-and-validate. (3) HARD internal go/no-go by ~Jun 18 w/ written falsification bar, leaving time to fall back to frozen book+lottery sleeve. Split epic into sub-B-IDs after survey returns.
out_of_scope: Options (banned). Abandoning the frozen survival book + lottery sleeve (remain FALLBACK, stay frozen-ready). Re-litigating the aggression ladder (CEO-reserved).

Real L2 backtest data ARRIVED 2026-06-16 (D:/PROJECTS/QuantHack/Syphonic_Backtest Data, 531 parquet, 20.3 GB, xSyphon pricer ladders, 2026-05-11..06-10). The Jun-18 OSR gate can now run on real depth for XAUUSD/EURUSD/XAGUSD. BTC/ETH/SOL ABSENT -> crypto OSR trials un-runnable. Adapter + 17->27 day split remap required first -> spawned B0184. Live access is MT5-only (no direct API).
add_link related->B0185

GO/NO-GO evidence for the Jun-18 OSR/L2 gate now CONVERGES on NO-GO (decision CEO-reserved, NOT taken here). Two independent negatives: (1) B0184 validation = EVENT-STARVED: OSR fires <=8 validation trades/trial across XAU/EUR/XAG x {full,top}, n<30 -> Sharpe NaN -> the pre-registered N>=300 holdout bar (B0165) is mechanically unreachable. (2) B0188 live-DOM parity = DEPTH PARITY FALSE: live MT5 ladder is a coarse, perfectly mirror-symmetric synthetic template (XAU 200/800/1000/2000/5000) whereas the parquet is a finer, often-asymmetric ladder (XAU 1-20 lots, mirror 0.325) -> OSR depth/queue/OFI features do NOT transfer to live; only L1 price/spread is parity-safe. Combined: not enough trades to MEASURE an edge on backtest, and the live depth it would trade is structurally different. This is an honest, pre-registered negative -> Best-Tech narrative asset (M8 deck). Recommend (CEO call): NO-GO on OSR/L2 deploy at Jun-18; fall back to frozen survival book + lottery sleeve (the standing barbell). Live L1 reader is still useful for survival-book/lottery execution (already covered by execution/mt5_broker.py).
history.reserved: OSR/L2 deploy decision = CEO-reserved per CLAUDE.md

history.reason: quant-phd-advisor (opus) brief 2026-06-16: NO-GO is the methodologically correct call (confidence 0.9). PSR>=0.95 is mathematically unreachable at n<=8 (sigma_SR swamps any estimate; Bailey-Lopez de Prado DSR 2014: hold-out inadequate for small samples). Running the conditional confirmatory holdout AFTER seeing primary validation starve = a multiple-testing/selection-bias trap (inflates effective N) that cannot produce a clean PASS and CAN manufacture a false one -> PRESERVE the holdout UNSPENT; record verdict INCONCLUSIVE/no-measurement (event-starved) + transfer-channel-falsified (B0188), NOT negative. Event-count true-scarcity precondition now verified. Keeps the door open for a future data regime with >=300 events + parity-true depth.

CEO RULING 2026-06-16: OSR/L2 = NO-GO for the live week. Verdict recorded INCONCLUSIVE / no-measurement (event-starved true scarcity, verified) + transfer-channel-falsified (B0188 synthetic live venue); the single confirmatory holdout is PRESERVED UNSPENT (advisor: running it = multiple-testing trap, unreachable PASS at n<=8). The book is NOT deployed. Salvage value retained: (a) Best-Tech architecture narrative (the honest pre-registered rejection), (b) reusable L2 infra (l2_adapter/microstructure features/pre-reg apparatus) -> feeds B0190, (c) live-venue characterization (B0188 L1 parity) that de-risks the survival-book + sleeve fills. Live plan = survival book + bold-during-cuts sleeve (B0182).

OSR/L2 epic complete with a NO-GO verdict (CEO 2026-06-16): built + validated + pre-registered + REJECTED on mechanical evidence. Not deployed live; infra + negative result retained (Best-Tech asset + B0190 research foundation).

Organizer (Duncan 2026-06-16) CONFIRMS backtest L2 depth is static/synthetic ("historical files mainly provide price movements; depth may remain static") -> a microstructure edge is UN-VALIDATABLE on the provided data -> NO-GO REINFORCED. But "liquidity/execution behaviour MAY CHANGE once real trading starts" -> re-probe live DOM at launch (Jun-21) to characterize whether live depth becomes dynamic; does NOT reopen the live-week deploy (cannot pre-validate; §14-lethal venue).

Duncan 2026-06-16 DEFINITIVE: no participant-driven order-flow simulation -> depth-reacting-to-flow microstructure signals are non-expressive (backtest+live). OSR/L2 NO-GO is organizer-confirmed at the mechanism level. Strong citable Best-Tech point: our pre-registered rejection correctly identified this before the organizer confirmed it.
